nodes.name: deepseek_common
nodes.description: Shared attention forward implementations for DeepSeek models (MHA, MLA, fused RoPE variants).

nodes.name: AttnForwardMethod
nodes.description: Enum selecting attention forward method: MHA, MLA, MHA_CHUNKED_KV, MHA_ONE_SHOT, MLA_FUSED_ROPE_ROCM, MLA_FUSED_ROPE_CPU, MHA_NPU, MLA_NPU, DSA_NPU.

nodes.name: DeepseekMHAForwardMixin
nodes.description: Mixin implementing chunked-prefix-cache MHA forward for DeepSeek.

nodes.name: DeepseekMLAForwardMixin
nodes.description: Mixin implementing MLA (Multi-Latent Attention) forward with absorb and NSA paths.

nodes.name: DeepseekMLACpuForwardMixin
nodes.description: CPU MLA forward using Intel AMX fused QKV+RoPE and BMM.

nodes.name: DeepseekMLARocmForwardMixin
nodes.description: ROCm MLA forward using grouped decode attention with fused RoPE.

nodes.name: merge_state_v2
nodes.description: Kernel function used by MHA chunked KV to merge attention outputs across chunks.

nodes.name: bmm_fp8
nodes.description: FP8 batched matrix multiplication used in MLA forward.

nodes.name: grouped_gemm_nt_f8f8bf16_masked
nodes.description: Grouped GEMM used in MLA forward for FP8 decode.

nodes.name: fused_qk_rope_cat_and_cache_mla
nodes.description: Fused RoPE+cache kernel for NSA MLA path.

nodes.name: qkv_proj_with_rope_fused_weight
nodes.description: Intel AMX fused QKV projection with RoPE for CPU MLA.

nodes.name: bmm_cpu
nodes.description: CPU BMM kernel used by CPU MLA forward.

nodes.name: decode_attention_fwd_grouped_rope
nodes.description: ROCm grouped decode attention with fused RoPE for MLA.

nodes.name: multimodal
nodes.description: Multimodal utilities and processors for vision, audio, and video inputs.

nodes.name: extract_audio_from_video_bytes
nodes.description: Extracts mono audio from video bytes using PyAV, CUDA-safe.

nodes.name: mm_utils
nodes.description: Utilities for anyres image processing and DP-sharded vision model execution.

nodes.name: run_dp_sharded_vision_model
nodes.description: Runs vision model across data-parallel shards with load balancing.

nodes.name: run_dp_sharded_mrope_vision_model
nodes.description: DP-sharded vision model execution with M-RoPE position IDs.

nodes.name: ViTCudaGraphRunner
nodes.description: Captures ViT blocks + merger into CUDA graphs for vision inference.

nodes.name: InternViTCudaGraphRunner
nodes.description: CUDA graph runner for InternVL ViT with [B,S,H] layout.

nodes.name: EVS
nodes.description: Efficient Video Sampling mixin that prunes temporally redundant video tokens.

nodes.name: compute_retention_mask
nodes.description: Computes per-frame retention mask based on cosine similarity between consecutive frames.

nodes.name: EVSEmbeddingResult
nodes.description: Result dataclass holding pruned embeddings and per-frame token counts.

nodes.name: EVSProcessor
nodes.description: Handles prompt construction with correct placeholder counts when EVS is active.

nodes.name: BaseMultimodalProcessor
nodes.description: Abstract base class for multimodal processors with CUDA IPC memory pool integration.

nodes.name: MultimodalSpecialTokens
nodes.description: Dataclass for regex-based special token matching in multimodal inputs.

nodes.name: QwenVLImageProcessor
nodes.description: Image/video processor for Qwen2-VL, Qwen2.5-VL, Qwen3-VL, Qwen3-Omni with smart resize and M-RoPE.

nodes.name: MiMoProcessor
nodes.description: Multimodal processor for MiMo-V2 supporting image, video, audio, and interleaved inputs.

nodes.name: WhisperProcessor
nodes.description: Speech-to-text processor with language normalization and fused autodetect support.

nodes.name: VoxtralMultimodalProcessor
nodes.description: Speech-to-text processor inserting [AUDIO] tokens and parsing Mistral chat templates.

nodes.name: TransformersAutoMultimodalProcessor
nodes.description: Generic processor applying HuggingFace processor directly for models like Gemma3.

nodes.name: multiplex
nodes.description: Prefill-decode multiplexing (PDMux) using separate CUDA streams and SM partitioning.

nodes.name: SchedulerMultiplexMixin
nodes.description: Scheduler mixin implementing PDMux event loop with separate prefill and decode streams.

nodes.name: event_loop_pdmux
nodes.description: Event loop that multiplexes prefill and decode on separate CUDA streams.

nodes.name: PDMuxConfig
nodes.description: Configuration dataclass for PDMux SM partitioning and stream groups.

nodes.name: divide_sm
nodes.description: Divides SMs between prefill and decode contexts.

nodes.name: initialize_stream_groups
nodes.description: Initializes green context streams for PDMux using sgl_kernel.spatial.

nodes.name: observability
nodes.description: Observability utilities: CPU monitoring, function latency timers, metrics collection.

nodes.name: time_func_latency
nodes.description: Decorator emitting Prometheus histogram metrics for function latency.

nodes.name: start_cpu_monitor_thread
nodes.description: Starts a thread using psutil to report process CPU seconds to Prometheus.

nodes.name: metrics_collector
nodes.description: Collects and exports scheduler and request metrics.

nodes.name: request_metrics_exporter
nodes.description: Exports per-request metrics for observability.

nodes.name: scheduler_metrics_mixin
nodes.description: Mixin adding metrics collection to the scheduler.

nodes.name: parser
nodes.description: Parsing utilities for code completion, conversation, reasoning, and Jinja templates.

nodes.name: code_completion_parser
nodes.description: Parser for code completion requests.

nodes.name: conversation
nodes.description: Conversation format parsing utilities.

nodes.name: reasoning_parser
nodes.description: Parser for reasoning content in model outputs.

nodes.name: jinja_template_utils
nodes.description: Utilities for Jinja template processing in chat templates.

nodes.name: harmony_parser
nodes.description: Harmony-specific parsing utilities.

nodes.name: platforms
nodes.description: Platform abstraction layer for device-specific operations.

nodes.name: device_mixin
nodes.description: Mixin providing device-specific utility methods.

nodes.name: interface
nodes.description: Platform interface definitions.

nodes.name: plugins
nodes.description: Plugin system with hook registry.

nodes.name: hook_registry
nodes.description: Registry for plugin hooks.

nodes.name: ray
nodes.description: Ray-based distributed execution: data parallel controller, engine, HTTP server, scheduler actor.

nodes.name: data_parallel_controller
nodes.description: Controller for data-parallel model execution.

nodes.name: engine
nodes.description: Ray engine wrapper for model inference.

nodes.name: http_server
nodes.description: HTTP server frontend running under Ray.

nodes.name: scheduler_actor
nodes.description: Ray actor managing the request scheduler.

nodes.name: sampling
nodes.description: Sampling logic: custom logit processors, batch info, sampling params, penalty library.

nodes.name: custom_logit_processor
nodes.description: Custom logit processing for sampling.

nodes.name: sampling_batch_info
nodes.description: Batch-level sampling metadata.

nodes.name: sampling_params
nodes.description: Per-request sampling parameter definitions.

nodes.name: penaltylib
nodes.description: Penalty library: frequency, presence, repetition penalties, min_new_tokens, orchestrator.

nodes.name: frequency_penalty
nodes.description: Frequency penalty implementation.

nodes.name: presence_penalty
nodes.description: Presence penalty implementation.

nodes.name: repetition_penalty
nodes.description: Repetition penalty implementation.

nodes.name: min_new_tokens
nodes.description: Enforces minimum number of new tokens.

nodes.name: orchestrator
nodes.description: Orchestrates multiple penalties during sampling.

nodes.name: server_args
nodes.description: Command-line argument definitions for the SGLang server.

nodes.name: server_args_config_parser
nodes.description: Parses server arguments from config files.

nodes.name: session
nodes.description: Session management: session controller and streaming session.

nodes.name: session_controller
nodes.description: Controller for persistent inference sessions.

nodes.name: streaming_session
nodes.description: Streaming session handling.

nodes.name: speculative
nodes.description: Speculative decoding implementation.

nodes.name: adaptive_runtime_state
nodes.description: Adaptive runtime state management for speculative decoding.

hyperedges.description: These classes implement the different attention forward variants selectable via AttnForwardMethod enum.
EVS pipeline: compute retention mask, prune embeddings, adjust prompt placeholders.
BaseMultimodalProcessor is the abstract base; concrete processors extend it for specific models.
PDMux system: scheduler mixin, config, SM division, and stream group initialization.
Penalty library subsystem with individual penalties and an orchestrator.
Observability stack: latency timers, CPU monitoring, metrics collection and export.
Ray-based distributed execution stack: controller, engine, HTTP server, scheduler actor.
